title: askellia corniculata
intro: Askellia corniculata, also known as Cornish heath or Cornish fritillary, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Askellia corniculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Askellia corniculata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
